subcodes.first_line: Every discerning soul attacheth not its heart to transient comfort, bounty and joy, but in all matters seeketh after eternal truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر نفس هوشيار براحت و نعمت و سرور موقّت دل نبندد در جميع امور حقيقت ابدی جويد
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
